rows.label: qev085503_MSG0001
rows.name: Eeh?! This is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0002
rows.name: Do you remember it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course I do. It's the very first gun I
was issued when I joined the military.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0004
rows.name: But, are we really going to use this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0005
rows.name:
Yes. For the time being, the use of
anything other than this is prohibited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0006
rows.name: But with this—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0007
rows.name: Elma-san chose it, for your sake, Gwin-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0008
rows.name: The Colonel—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0009
rows.name:
Thank you very much. I will
try using this for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0010
rows.name:
I've accepted some missions,
so let's go right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0011
rows.name: Eh, suddenly?! And three of them at that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0012
rows.name: Now, no dawdling! Let's go, quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0013
rows.name: Y-yes, Ma'am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0014
rows.name: Momo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_JNK0010
rows.name: Shudder

rows.label: qev085503_SEL0011
rows.name: Mutter under your breath about the "demon instructor."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_JNK0020
rows.name: Protest

rows.label: qev085503_SEL0021
rows.name: Interject that this is too strict.

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0015
rows.name:
That's right mo, she's a demon instructor mo!
Elma-san, what suddenly got into you mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0016
rows.name:
It reminds me of the time at the training camp.
Colonel Elma was famous for being strict.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0017
rows.name:
No, that's not it. This is
what they call "tough love"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0018
rows.name:
If that's the case, then fine, but...
back when we were at the training camp—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0019
rows.name: You there, no idle chatter![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0020
rows.name: Y-yes, Ma'am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0021
rows.name:
The optimal weapon for me— Since Colonel
Elma is choosing it for me, it must
surely be an amazing weapon, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0022
rows.name:
Eh? You're asking if this suit is optimal
too? Haha, this is for training.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085503_MSG0023
rows.name:
When I go on missions, I change into
my usual gear, so please don't worry![ST:wait ]
